line: // KDL stress fixture: a reviewable service catalog.

// Decimal integers include signs and separators.
// Every prefixed integer base is represented.
// Fractional, exponent, and special floating-point forms.
// Language constants in argument and property positions.
// Quoted strings and every escape recognized by the grammar.
// Hash-delimited raw strings preserve quotes and backslashes.
// Normal multiline strings carry state across several lines.

line: // Annotations can describe nodes, arguments, and property values.
// Properties and positional arguments can be mixed.
// Semicolons exercise node names following an inline terminator.
colors red="ff0000"; green value="00ff00"; blue value="0000ff"
coordinates x=12.5; y value=-7.25; z value=0.0
// Line comments terminate without leaking state.
tracing enabled=#true // another closed line comment
/* A regular block comment occupies one line. */
